# FamilyBridge

> Recovery Support for Families Affected by Addiction

FamilyBridge is an AI-powered platform helping families support loved ones in recovery through transparent communication, financial coordination, verified meeting check-ins, and professional oversight tools.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://familybridgeapp.com/
- Family Plan: https://familybridgeapp.com/family-purchase
- Provider Plan: https://familybridgeapp.com/provider-purchase
- Demo: https://familybridgeapp.com/demo
- Family Demo: https://familybridgeapp.com/demo/family
- Meeting Check-Ins: https://familybridgeapp.com/meetings
- Enabling Exercise: https://familybridgeapp.com/enabling-exercise
- Support: https://familybridgeapp.com/support

## About

Founded by Matt Brown, a 20+ year addiction interventionist. FamilyBridge was built because families navigating a loved one's addiction need structure, transparency, and professional support — not just hope.

Features include AI-powered pattern detection, moderated family communication, transparent financial requests, GPS-verified meeting check-ins, and clinical professional oversight.

## Pricing

- Family Plan: $19.99/month
- Provider Plan: Contact for pricing
- Moderator Plan: Contact for pricing

## Contact
